title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd!
